recalls.Description:
Beloems has issued a recall for its adult portable bed rails, specifically model BL-BR201. These foldable bed rails feature white metal tubing and are equipped with rounded black or gray foam rubber handle grips, support legs, and a fabric pouch. The product is identifiable by the "Beloems" logo on the fabric cover and the model number found in the owner's manual. Consumers should be aware of the serious safety risks associated with these bed rails.

The recalled bed rails do not comply with mandatory safety standards, which can lead to entrapment or asphyxiation hazards. Additionally, they fail to meet structural stability requirements, posing a fall risk. Incorrectly sized push pins and holes further increase the risk of lacerations. It is crucial for consumers to take immediate action regarding this recall.
recalls.Title: Recall of Beloems Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to Beloems via email at leioujiapin@163.com.

To properly dispose of the bed rails, cut the foam padding on the handrails, mark the upper and lower rails with "RECALLED" using a permanent marker, and send a photo of the destroyed product to leioujiapin@163.com.

Ningbo Tianqi Electronic has announced a recall for FUFU&GAGA queen size Murphy wall beds featuring a white wood frame. These wall-mounted beds can fold into a cabinet and measure approximately 86 inches in height and 65 inches in width. The model number KF210284US-01MH-A001 is located on the instruction booklet and packaging. Consumers should be aware of the potential dangers associated with these products.

The wall bed's heavy 215-pound frame poses significant risks during assembly or disassembly, including the possibility of falling and causing severe impact, crush, or laceration injuries. It is crucial for consumers to take immediate action regarding this recall to ensure their safety.

recalls.Description:
Avenco and Novilla have issued a recall for their mattresses due to non-compliance with mandatory flammability standards, which poses a serious fire risk that could lead to injury or death. The affected mattresses come in various thicknesses of 6, 10, 12, and 14 inches and are available in sizes including twin, full, queen, and king. Each mattress features a white exterior with an accent color on the sides, available in light gray, dark gray, or navy, depending on the model. Important identification details such as the manufacturer name 'PT Champion', manufacturing date, model numbers, and sizes are printed on a sewn-in label on the side of the mattress. 

Consumers are advised to stop using these mattresses immediately and contact PT Champion for a free fitted cover that will ensure compliance with safety standards. The recall affects several models manufactured between November 2024 and January 2025, which can be identified by specific model numbers and manufacturing dates.
recalls.Title: Recall of Avenco and Novilla Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard Violating Flammability Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can reach PT Champion via email at recall@champmattress.com or visit https://www.novilla.net/pages/recall or https://www.avencohome.com/pages/recall. Additional details can also be found on their websites by clicking 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

recalls.Description:
Medical King is recalling two types of bed rails: the Bed Assist Rail with Adjustable Heights (models 7007 and 7057) and the Bed Assist Rail Without Legs (model 7037). The adjustable model features black or white metal tubing, a rounded black foam rubber grip, and a fabric pouch, while the legless version is made of silver metal tubing with a black grip handle and pouch. The recalled bed rails pose significant safety risks, as users can become trapped between the rail and the mattress, leading to potential asphyxiation hazards. Consumers are urged to cease use of these products immediately to prevent serious injury or death.

recalls.Description:
Adven Group is recalling all sizes and thicknesses of the Nap Queen Sleep Victoria Cooling Gel and Pocket Coil Hybrid Mattresses produced before October 2023. These mattresses, identified by model numbers NQ691011, NQ691015, NQ691021, NQ691031, NQ691041, NQ691211, NQ691215, NQ691221, NQ691231, NQ691241, NQ69811, NQ69815, NQ69821, NQ69831, and NQ69841, feature a white knit top quilted in a wavy diamond pattern and a black woven quilted side panel. They were sold compressed in a box with distinctive black edges and yellow stitching. The mattress cover includes a label displaying "Nap Queen Sleep," "Victoria Hybrid," the model number, and the manufacture date.

These mattresses do not meet federal flammability standards, which poses a significant fire hazard. Consumers are advised to stop using the recalled mattresses immediately and contact Nap Queen for a free fitted cover that will ensure compliance with safety regulations. The company is reaching out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.Description: Medline Industries is recalling two models of adult portable bed rails, MDS6800BA and MDS6800BAH, due to serious safety concerns. Both models feature a black metal frame with a foam grip handle and a fabric pouch. The MDS6800BA was sold individually, while the MDS6800BAH was available in sets of three. Each unit has a label indicating the Medline brand and model number on the support frame.

recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Medline at 866-359-1704 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday to Friday, or via email at recalls@medline.com. More information is available online at https://recalls.medline.com or https://athome.medline.com by clicking on 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

The recalled models are identified by the labels C2192Y-N04 for white and C2193Y-N04 for cherry, found on the rear panel.

recalls.Description: Red Land Cotton is recalling its quilts and quilted shams due to a potential laceration hazard. The Classic quilts are available in various colors including white, natural, ticking stripe, blue, and gray, and come in twin, full/queen, and king/California king sizes. The quilted euro shams are offered in white, natural, and ticking stripe, while king and standard shams are available in white, natural, blue, gray, and ticking stripe. Additionally, baby quilts are sold in white, natural, and charcoal ticking print.
recalls.Title: Red Land Cotton Recalls Quilts and Shams Due to Laceration Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can contact Red Land Cotton at 877-478-3467 from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email customer service at info@redlandcotton.com. More information can be found by visiting www.redlandcotton.com/pages/voluntary-quilt-recall or by checking the "Voluntary Recall" tab on their website.

recalls.Description: Essential Medical Supply has reannounced the recall of several models of adult portable bed rails due to significant safety hazards, including entrapment and asphyxia risks. The affected models include the Hand Bed Rail (model P1410), Hand Bed Rail with Pouch (model P1410-P), Hand Bed Rail with Floor Support (model P1411), and Hand Bed Rail with Floor Support with Pouch (model P1411-P). These bed rails are identifiable by the brand name and model number printed on a label on the grip handle. They are constructed from chrome or white metal tubing and feature black padding on the grip handle and under-bed frame, measuring approximately 17 to 21 inches in height and 20 inches in width. Only bed rails without model numbers ending in 'R' are part of this recall.
recalls.Title: Essential Medical Supply Recalls Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Entrapment and Asphyxia Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can contact Essential Medical Supply at 800-826-8423 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit essentialmedicalsupply.com and click on 'Important Safety Notice' at the top of the page. He died at his home in December 2012, reportedly from the Endurance Hand Bed Rail (model P1410).

recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Room & Board at 800-301-9720, available Monday to Friday from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT and Saturday to Sunday from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT. You can also email shop@roomandboard.com or visit www.roomandboard.com/product-recalls for further details.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to the Windsor Queen Xtrabed Mobile Murphy Bed, available in white, brown, and gray finishes. When stored, the bed measures approximately 62 inches wide and 47 inches tall, resembling a set of drawers. In its bed configuration, it expands to about 62 inches wide and 82 inches long. The affected models were manufactured before May 2022 and lack a notch in the small tray, which can be seen when the bed is opened.

recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to J Grubb Designs at 800-392-0090 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, email Service@roomandloft.com, or visit www.roomandloft.com/recalls or www.roomandloft.com and click on "Recalls" at the bottom for further details.
